title: Fix missing 'itemReviewed' field in Review structured data (Schema.org)

requirements.summary: Add itemReviewed property to each Review object in JSON-LD structured data to fix Google Rich Results 'itemReviewed missing' error
acceptanceCriteria: Every `Review` object in the JSON-LD structured data includes an `itemReviewed` property with `@type: 'LocalBusiness'` and `name: 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'`.
The JSON-LD block remains valid JSON and does not break any existing structured data fields (LocalBusiness, areaServed, knowsAbout, AggregateRating, etc.).
Google Rich Results Test no longer reports the 'itemReviewed missing' error for the page.
No other structured data warnings or errors are introduced by the change.

file_operations.description: Update the JSON-LD structured data script block to add the required 'itemReviewed' property to each Review object in the 'review' array of the LocalBusiness schema. Each itemReviewed must reference the business with type 'LocalBusiness' and name 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'. Ensure the AggregateRating remains correctly nested within the LocalBusiness entity. Verify that all existing structured data fields (LocalBusiness type, areaServed, knowsAbout, telephone, address, openingHours, geo coordinates, etc.) remain intact and unchanged. Validate the resulting JSON-LD syntax is valid and passes Google's Rich Results Test without the 'itemReviewed missing' error.
